title: knautia salcedii
intro: Knautia salcedii, also known as Satureja salcedii or Salcedo's savory, is a flowering plant species in the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Knautia salcedii include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce stress, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in culinary applications to add flavor and aroma to various dishes.
